_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: Loss of NF1 alone resulted in 1439 differentially expressed genes compared with wild-type cells
